about.title: Who's behind Vexxo Studio?
about.subtitle: I'm a student entrepreneur bridging the gap between academic theory and real-world execution. Vexxo Studio started as a passion project and evolved into a boutique agency focused on helping fellow founders build products that don't just look good — they perform.
about.contactSubtitle: Have an idea or project in mind? Feel free to send a mail — I usually reply within 1–2 business days.

company.title: Built for builders.
company.subtitle: No agency overhead. No back-and-forth. Just a founder who cares about your product as much as you do.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: To help entrepreneurs and startups build high-performance web experiences at a fair price — without agency bloat or freelancer chaos.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: A world where every ambitious founder has access to world-class web design without the world-class price tag.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: A clear 5-step process. No surprises — you know where we stand at every moment.

comparison.title: Why Vexxo vs the rest?
comparison.subtitle: See how we stack up against a typical agency or freelancer.
comparison.agencyNote: High margins, slow delivery, lots of account managers.
comparison.freelancerNote: Lots of back-and-forth, inconsistent quality, availability risk.
comparison.vexxoNote: Direct founder contact, fast delivery, transparent pricing.

seo.title: Vexxo Studio — Clean Code. Sharp Design. Real Results.
seo.description: Freelance web design & development studio based in Belgium. Premium websites for small and medium businesses. Transparent pricing, fast delivery.

services.title: What we do
services.subtitle: From first sketch to launch. You get a website that looks great and actually works for your business.
services.pageSubtitle: Choose a plan that fits your business.

process.title: How it works
process.subtitle: A clear step-by-step process, no surprises.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.subtitle: Tell us briefly what you need and we'll schedule a free intake call.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our pricing and process.
faq.q1: What's included in the base price?
faq.a1: The base price covers design, development and delivery of your website. Includes 1 revision round, responsive layout and basic SEO structure.
faq.q2: How long does a typical project take?
faq.a2: A standard 5-page website is delivered in 1–2 weeks. More pages or rush factor may affect timing.
faq.a3: 1 revision round is included by default. Additional revisions can be added on.
faq.q4: What if I need more pages later?
faq.a4: No problem — we add pages at €60 each. You only pay for what you need.
faq.a5: 50% upfront, 50% on delivery. Payment by bank transfer.
